title: Natalie Grillo Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Natalie Grillo Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Natalie Grillo
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’26
Career Changer
Natalie Grillo knows that it’s never too late to switch careers. After working in health care for 15 years, a Break Into Tech event introduced her to the Align Online program, which empowered her to shift toward computer science. Now she’s trading ambulances for office work, making connections at large tech companies she never imagined she’d have access to.
Having done my undergrad as an adult as well, there were moments I was like, ‘Oh no, is this for me? Am I too late?’ But with Northeastern and Khoury College’s Align Online, it’s right on time
Natalie Grillo, MSCS ’26
Explore all Khoury Stories
